hero.headline:
Your Best Look,
Every Single Day
hero.subheadline: Step into a space where expert hands, premium products, and a warm atmosphere come together to reveal the best version of you.

intro.heading:
More Than a Salon.
A Sanctuary.
intro.body: At Orchid, we believe every visit should feel like a reset — a moment just for you. Launched in 2025, we are crafting personalised experiences for both men and women, blending traditional techniques with modern trends to deliver results that speak for themselves. Whether you walk in for a quick trim or a full spa ritual, you leave feeling your absolute best.

highlights.title: Premium Products Only
highlights.description: We use top-tier, skin-safe products chosen for lasting results and zero compromise on your hair and skin health.

highlights.title: Expert Stylists
highlights.description: Our team stays ahead of the curve with ongoing training in cutting, colouring, skincare, and spa therapies.

highlights.title: Unisex & Inclusive
highlights.description: Everyone is welcome here. Our services are designed for all genders, ages, and hair types — no exceptions.

highlights.title: Hygienic & Safe
highlights.description: We maintain strict hygiene standards — fresh towels, sterilised tools, and a clean environment for every client.

ctaBanner.heading: Ready for Your Transformation?
ctaBanner.subheading: Walk in or book ahead — we're ready when you are.
